name: Fireweed Metals Corp.
description: Fireweed Metals Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on advancing its flagship Macmillan Pass Project in Yukon, Canada, which hosts large zinc-lead-silver deposits. The company is also exploring the Mactung Project, one of the largest high-grade tungsten deposits in the world, and the Gayna River Project, a highly prospective zinc-lead-gallium-germanium target. Fireweed aims to responsibly develop critical mineral projects to support the global transition to a low-carbon economy.
